name: Lentivirus Production & Transduction

components.name: 1. Day −1: Seed 4×10⁶ HEK293T cells in 10 cm dish (DMEM + 10% FBS)

note.en: Cells should be 70–80% confluent on Day 0. Do not use antibiotics (impairs transfection).
note.zh: Day 0 细胞汇合度应为 70–80%。不用抗生素（影响转染效率）。

note.en: DNA ratio: Transfer vector : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1 (µg). E.g., 10 µg : 7.5 µg : 2.5 µg per 10 cm dish. Total DNA: 20 µg. Dilute in 500 µL Opti-MEM.
note.zh: 质粒比例：转移载体 : psPAX2 : pMD2.G = 4:3:1（µg）。10 cm 皿：10 µg : 7.5 µg : 2.5 µg。总 DNA：20 µg。加入 500 µL Opti-MEM 稀释。

components.name: 3. Day 0: Prepare transfection reagent (PEI or Lipo2000)

note.en: PEI (1 mg/mL linear PEI, MW 25,000): add 60 µL (3:1 PEI:DNA ratio by µg) to 500 µL Opti-MEM; mix 5 min RT. Add PEI+Opti-MEM to DNA+Opti-MEM; mix gently; incubate 20 min RT. Add dropwise to cells.
note.zh: PEI（1 mg/mL 线性 PEI，MW 25,000）：60 µL PEI（PEI:DNA = 3:1 质量比）加入 500 µL Opti-MEM，RT 5 min。PEI+Opti-MEM 加入 DNA+Opti-MEM，轻柔混合，RT 20 min。逐滴加入细胞。

components.name: 4. Day 1 (16–18 h): Replace medium with 12 mL fresh DMEM + 10% FBS + 10 mM HEPES

note.en: HEPES stabilizes virus at neutral pH. Medium change reduces transfection reagent toxicity. Do gently to avoid detaching 293T cells.
note.zh: HEPES 在中性 pH 下稳定病毒。换液减少转染试剂毒性。操作要轻柔，避免 293T 细胞脱落。

components.name: 5. Day 2 (48 h): First harvest — collect all supernatant; add 12 mL fresh medium

note.en: Filter through 0.45 µm PES membrane (NOT nitrocellulose — binds VSV-G). Keep harvest at 4°C or process immediately.
note.zh: 0.45 µm PES 膜过滤（不用硝酸纤维素膜——会结合 VSV-G）。上清 4°C 保存或立即处理。

components.name: 6. Day 3 (72 h): Second harvest — collect supernatant; pool with Day 2

note.en: Pool Day 2 + Day 3 harvests. Day 3 typically higher titer.
note.zh: 合并 Day 2 + Day 3 上清。Day 3 通常滴度更高。

components.name: 7. Concentrate virus (optional): 10,000×g 4°C 16 h (ultracentrifuge) or PEG precipitation

note.en: Ultracentrifugation: 25,000 rpm (SW-28 rotor) 2 h 4°C; resuspend pellet in PBS + 1% BSA. PEG-it (System Bio): add 1:4 PEG-it, 4°C overnight, 1,500×g 30 min 4°C.
note.zh: 超速离心：25,000 rpm（SW-28 转头）4°C 2 h；沉淀用 PBS + 1% BSA 重悬。PEG-it 沉淀：1:4 PEG-it，4°C 过夜，1,500×g 4°C 30 min。

components.name: 8. Titer determination: p24 ELISA or functional titer (IU/mL)

note.en: See lentiviral_titer_p24 or lentiviral_titer_functional. Typical unconcentrated: 10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL; concentrated: 10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL.
note.zh: 参见 lentiviral_titer_p24 或 lentiviral_titer_functional。未浓缩：10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL；浓缩后：10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL。

components.name: 9. Transduce target cells: virus + polybrene (8 µg/mL); MOI 0.3–5

note.en: MOI 0.3–1 for stable integration (low MOI ensures single integration). MOI 5–10 for transient or high-expression needs. Spinoculation optional (800×g 30 min RT) to increase efficiency.
note.zh: MOI 0.3–1 用于稳转（低 MOI 确保单拷贝整合）。MOI 5–10 用于瞬时或高表达需求。离心感染（800×g 30 min RT）可选，提高效率。

components.name: 10. Day 2 post-transduction: replace medium; Day 3+: add selection (Puromycin 1–2 µg/mL)

note.en: Kill curve: first establish Puromycin kill curve in untransduced cells (48–72 h for clean kill). GFP-virus: verify by flow cytometry before antibiotic selection.
note.zh: 先在未转导细胞中建立嘌呤霉素杀灭曲线（48–72 h 彻底杀灭）。GFP 病毒：抗生素筛选前先用流式细胞仪验证。

components.name: 11. Store virus: −80°C in single-use aliquots; avoid freeze-thaw

note.en: VSV-G lentivirus loses ~50% titer per freeze-thaw cycle. Add 10% trehalose or sucrose as cryoprotectant.
note.zh: VSV-G 慢病毒每次冻融损失约 50% 滴度。可加 10% 海藻糖或蔗糖作冻存保护剂。

notes.en: BSL-2 work: use BSL-2 practices for VSV-G pseudotyped virus. HEK293T must be >85% confluent at transfection. P24 ELISA: 1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁷ IU/mL (approximate). Typical issues: low titer → check psPAX2/pMD2.G ratio, 293T health; no selection → confirm antibiotic resistance in plasmid.
notes.zh: 生物安全：VSV-G 假型慢病毒需 BSL-2 操作。转染时 HEK293T 需 >85% 汇合度。P24 ELISA：1 ng p24 ≈ 10⁷ IU/mL（近似）。常见问题：滴度低→检查包装质粒比例、293T 细胞状态；无筛选→确认质粒含抗生素耐药基因。

ref: Tiscornia et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:241–245; Mochizuki et al. (1998) J Virol 72:8873; Kutner et al. (2009) Nat Protoc 4:495–505

briefSteps.en: Day −1: seed HEK293T → Day 0: prepare 3-plasmid mix (transfer:psPAX2:pMD2.G = 4:3:1) + PEI, transfect → Day 1: replace medium → Day 2 & 3: harvest supernatant, filter 0.45 µm → concentrate (optional) → titer → transduce target cells with polybrene → select stable integrants
briefSteps.zh: Day −1 接种 HEK293T → Day 0 制备三质粒混合液（4:3:1）+ PEI 转染 → Day 1 换液 → Day 2 & 3 收获上清 0.45 µm 过滤 → 可选浓缩 → 滴度测定 → 聚凝胺协助转导靶细胞 → 筛选稳转株

detailedSteps.en: Day −1: Seed 4×10⁶ HEK293T cells (passage <20) per 10 cm dish in 10 mL complete DMEM without antibiotics; cells should reach 70–80% confluency by Day 0.
detailedSteps.zh: Day −1：在无抗生素完全 DMEM 中将 4×10⁶ HEK293T 细胞（代次 <20）接种至 10 cm 皿，Day 0 汇合度应达 70–80%。

detailedSteps.en: Day 0: Prepare DNA mix in 500 µL Opti-MEM: transfer vector 10 µg + psPAX2 7.5 µg + pMD2.G 2.5 µg (ratio 4:3:1; total 20 µg). Mix gently.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 0：在 500 µL Opti-MEM 中制备质粒混合液：转移载体 10 µg + psPAX2 7.5 µg + pMD2.G 2.5 µg（比例 4:3:1，总计 20 µg），轻混。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare PEI solution: add 60 µL of 1 mg/mL linear PEI (MW 25,000) to 500 µL Opti-MEM; mix 5 min at RT, then combine with DNA tube; mix gently and incubate 20 min at RT to form PEI-DNA complexes.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备 PEI 溶液：60 µL 1 mg/mL 线性 PEI（MW 25,000）加入 500 µL Opti-MEM，RT 混合 5 min，然后与 DNA 混合管合并，轻混后 RT 孵育 20 min 形成 PEI-DNA 复合物。

detailedSteps.en: Add PEI-DNA complex dropwise to HEK293T cells; gently swirl to distribute. Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 PEI-DNA 复合物逐滴加入 HEK293T 细胞，轻柔晃动，37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育。

detailedSteps.en: Day 1 (16–18 h post-transfection): Carefully aspirate medium and replace with 12 mL fresh DMEM + 10% FBS + 10 mM HEPES. Work gently to avoid detaching 293T cells.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 1（转染后 16–18 h）：轻柔吸去培养基，换成 12 mL 新鲜 DMEM + 10% FBS + 10 mM HEPES，操作要轻避免 293T 细胞脱落。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2 (48 h): Collect all supernatant; immediately filter through a 0.45 µm PES syringe filter (NOT nitrocellulose). Store filtrate at 4°C. Add 12 mL fresh medium back to cells.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 2（48 h）：收集全部上清，立即经 0.45 µm PES 注射器滤膜过滤（不用硝酸纤维素膜）。滤液 4°C 保存。补回 12 mL 新鲜培养基。

detailedSteps.en: Day 3 (72 h): Collect second harvest supernatant; filter through 0.45 µm PES and pool with Day 2 harvest. Day 3 typically gives higher titer.
detailedSteps.zh: Day 3（72 h）：收集第二次上清，0.45 µm PES 过滤后与 Day 2 上清合并，Day 3 通常滴度更高。

detailedSteps.en: Optional concentration: ultracentrifuge at 25,000 rpm (SW-28 rotor), 4°C, 2 h; resuspend pellet in PBS + 1% BSA. Expected titer: unconcentrated 10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL; concentrated 10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选浓缩：25,000 rpm（SW-28 转头）4°C 超速离心 2 h；PBS + 1% BSA 重悬沉淀。预期滴度：未浓缩 10⁶–10⁷ IU/mL；浓缩后 10⁸–10⁹ IU/mL。

detailedSteps.en: Determine viral titer by p24 ELISA or functional transduction assay. Aliquot virus into single-use tubes; store at −80°C. Add 10% trehalose or sucrose as cryoprotectant to minimize freeze-thaw loss.
detailedSteps.zh: 通过 p24 ELISA 或功能滴度检测病毒滴度。分装至一次性用量管 −80°C 保存，加 10% 海藻糖或蔗糖作冻存保护剂减少冻融损失。

detailedSteps.en: Transduce target cells with lentivirus at MOI 0.3–1 (for stable single-integration) in the presence of 8 µg/mL polybrene. Optional spinoculation: 800 × g, 30 min, RT to increase efficiency.
detailedSteps.zh: 用慢病毒以 MOI 0.3–1（稳转单拷贝整合）在 8 µg/mL 聚凝胺存在下转导靶细胞。可选离心感染：800 × g、RT 30 min 提高效率。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2 post-transduction: replace medium. Day 3+: begin antibiotic selection (e.g., puromycin 1–2 µg/mL; first establish a kill curve in untransduced cells).
detailedSteps.zh: 转导后 Day 2 换液；Day 3 起加抗生素筛选（如嘌呤霉素 1–2 µg/mL；先在未转导细胞中建立杀灭曲线）。

note.en: After Day 1 medium change, cells incubate overnight; Day 2 harvest proceeds next morning.
note.zh: Day 1 换液后细胞过夜孵育，次日进行 Day 2 收获。

note.en: Filtered Day 2 harvest can be held at 4°C up to 48 h while awaiting the Day 3 harvest before pooling and processing.
note.zh: Day 2 过滤上清可 4°C 保存最长 48 h，等 Day 3 收获后合并处理。

note.en: Aliquoted virus at −80°C is stable for up to 12 months; transduce target cells at any convenient time.
note.zh: 分装病毒 −80°C 保存，最长可稳定 12 个月，可在合适时间转导靶细胞。

usage.en: Produce lentiviral particles by transient transfection of HEK293T cells with packaging plasmids.
usage.zh: 瞬时转染 HEK293T 细胞生产慢病毒颗粒。
